area2.name: Secondary Somatosensory Cortex
area2.description: Integrates sensory info from the body.

area17.name: Primary Visual Cortex
area17.description: Processes visual input from the eyes.

area21.name: Middle Temporal Gyrus
area21.description: Involved in auditory processing and language.

area22.name: Superior Temporal Gyrus
area22.description: Important for auditory perception and language.

area23.name: Ventral Posterior Cingulate Cortex
area23.description: Part of limbic system, involved in emotion.

area24.name: Dorsal Anterior Cingulate Cortex
area24.description: Emotion regulation, attention, and cognitive control.
